name: Metalline Mining Company
description: Metalline Mining Company was a mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on its Sierra Mojada Project located in Coahuila, Mexico, which contained significant deposits of silver, copper, zinc, and lead. The company was incorporated in the United States and historically traded under the ticker symbol MMG. In April 2011, Metalline Mining Company underwent a corporate restructuring and changed its name to Silver Bull Resources, Inc., shifting its strategic focus while continuing to manage its mineral property assets.
